EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IUtilityNetworkQuery2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that query the elements of the utility network with 64-bit object ids.

[Guid("968C4639-AF25-4B67-8AB1-84BC322C1B11")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IUtilityNetworkQuery2 : IUtilityNetworkQuery
